item_text: Explain the purpose and duration of the call
Ask how long ago the customer last subscribed
Inform confidentiality and usage of responses
Ask what part of the event caught the customer's interest initially
Ask what one thing could be improved to make customer consider subscribing
Ask how the customer first came across the event
Ask what stopped the customer from subscribing to the event
Ask if the customer was also looking for other outdoor experiences
Ask if the customer checked out other outdoor experiences before booking
Ask how early the customer expects to be informed before an adventure event
Ask what would make the customer more likely to subscribe again
